eligible_applicant_type: microenterprises with five or fewer employees
project_area: Small business growth, job creation, and economic development in Hartford
demographic_requirements: Priority given to businesses in low-to-moderate income neighborhoods and historically underserved communities
eligibility_summary: Open to Hartford-based microenterprises (5 or fewer employees) seeking funding ($2,500-$5,000) and technical support to start, stabilize, or grow their business. Funded through HUD CDBG and ARPA.
